name: Oatmeal Pancakes
recipeIngredient: 1 egg white (I haven't tried egg replacer yet)
1 to 2 cups nonfat milk (to consistency) (haven't tried soy milk yet)
1/2 cup raisins [not sure why raisins are "wet" vs "dry"]
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the dry ingredients separately: oatmeal, whole wheat flour, baking powder, cinnamon, and nutmeg.
2. In a separate bowl, beat the egg white (I haven't tried an egg replacer yet).
3. Add 1 old banana (sometimes 2! - I like bananas) to the wet mixture.
4. Stir in 1 tbsp honey.
5. Gradually add 1 to 2 cups of nonfat milk (to consistency) (haven't tried soy milk yet) to the dry ingredients, mixing until a batter forms.
6. Fold in 1/2 cup raisins [not sure why raisins are "wet" vs "dry"].
